title: Phase 21.1 — Data Integrity Correction + Top 15 Indexing Execution
executive_summary: Phase 21.1 corrected a critical data integrity error (619 vs 526 discovered URLs) and established a verified indexing execution framework. Root cause: Phase 21 used sitemap-minus-impressions (619 URLs) instead of the GSC discovered-not-indexed group (526). URL Inspection API verification revealed only 1 of 10 drilldown-extracted URLs was truly discovered. 15 high-priority indexing targets were identified across 3 categories: 3 discovered guides, 4 unknown-to-Google pages, and 8 indexed-but-zero-impression pages. 40 internal links planned. 7 GSC UI indexing requests eligible. Validate Fix remains blocked. SEO engine restricted to effectiveness mode until audit grade improves.
overall_status: OFF_TRACK — 0 clicks, 424 imp 7d, 0 backlinks. Engine grade: D. Restricted mode active.

section_1_data_integrity.title: 1. Data Integrity Correction
section_1_data_integrity.error: 619 URLs classified vs GSC 526 — used wrong data source (sitemap minus GSC impressions = 619, not discovered-not-indexed = 526)
root_causes: Mixed sitemap inventory with GSC discovered group
CloakBrowser text extraction captured entire page (nav + table), not just drilldown rows
URL Inspection verified 5 of 10 drilldown URLs were already indexed (PASS)
section_1_data_integrity.corrected: Used URL Inspection API to verify coverage states. Built verified master with 10 confirmed URLs.

section_5_fix_log.title: 5. Fix Plan
section_5_fix_log.fixes_planned: HTTP 200 verification, index/follow, canonical, sitemap, internal links, FAQ, content improvements

section_6_internal_links.title: 6. Internal Authority Push
section_6_internal_links.source_pages: indexed pages with impressions + Tier 1 calculators + indexed blogs

section_7_gsc_indexing.title: 7. GSC UI Indexing Requests
section_7_gsc_indexing.note: Execute via CloakBrowser GSC UI automation after deploy

section_11_deploy.title: 11. Deploy
section_11_deploy.note: Documentation/reports committed. Code implementation (internal links) scheduled for next daily execution.

key_insight: The biggest indexing problem is NOT that pages aren't indexed — it's that indexed pages have 0 impressions. 8 of 15 top targets are already indexed but don't rank. The 7 truly undiscovered/unindexed pages (3 guides + 4 unknown) need indexing + ranking. The 8 indexed pages need CONTENT and AUTHORITY improvement.
